/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_pattern_match.dir/test_pattern_match.cpp.o -o test_pattern_match  libstage0_lib.a
